rationale: The proposed change to the residence homestead exemption in §11.13(b) has no textual overlap with §11.21, which governs exemptions for school property. The sections address unrelated exemption categories.
quote: Sec. 11.21. SCHOOLS. (a) A person is entitled to an exemption from taxation of:
_note: Rule text is §11.21 (school property exemption), which is unrelated to the proposed change targeting §11.13(b) (residence homestead exemption). No conflict identified.
